name: Elemental Channeling - Caustic Eruption
description: Creatures of your choice within 30 feet make a Constitution save. On a failure, a creature takes 2d10 + your cleric level acid damage and is poisoned until the end of your next turn; on a success it takes half damage and is not poisoned. The ground in a 10-foot radius centered on you becomes searing slag and counts as difficult terrain; the first time a creature enters that area on a turn it takes acid damage equal to your Wisdom modifier.
